IApiServerConfig Events

One Identity Manager API Server

The IApiServerConfig type exposes the following members.

Events
  NameDescription
Disposing
Called when the server environment is shutting down.
PreparingShutdown
Called when the server enters the PrepareUnavailable state, or when the server is being disposed. This event is only invoked once.
Top
See Also

Reference

IApiServerConfig Interface
QBM.CompositionApi.Config Namespace
